---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/headshot.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/YOUR-USERNAME
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-PROFILE
---

I am an experimental psychologist with interests in quantitative methods, psychometrics, and reproducible reporting.
